name: Octopus Deploy
description: Continuous deployment and release management platform. Connects to the Octopus Deploy REST API to verify server status, user access, and deployment audit trails.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Octopus Deploy instance
2. Click your profile image and select Profile
3. Click My API Keys
4. Click New API key, provide a purpose, and click Generate New
5. Copy the API key and paste it in CompAI
6. Enter your Octopus Deploy instance URL (e.g., https://your-instance.octopus.app)

credentialFields.label: Octopus Deploy Instance URL
credentialFields.helpText: The base URL of your Octopus Deploy instance (e.g., https://mycompany.octopus.app or https://octopus.mycompany.com)

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Octopus Deploy API key. Found under Profile > My API Keys.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to the Octopus Deploy instance by checking the server status endpoint.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews users configured in the Octopus Deploy instance to verify employee access controls.

checks.name: Deployment Audit
checks.description: Reviews recent deployments in Octopus Deploy to verify deployment activity and audit trails.
